evals.name: by-id-named-resume
evals.prompt: Make a one-page cover letter for WaterlooWorks job 475135 using ai.pdf.
evals.expected_output: coverletter/Jaza-Energy-coverletter.pdf: one page, Times style, name 'Jordan Goose' centered, address-left/LinkedIn+email-right header, tailored to the Jaza Energy AI Engineering Co-op (Fall 2026) using real ai.pdf experience.

assertions.name: pdf_named_for_company
assertions.text: An output PDF exists in coverletter/ whose filename is derived from the company (e.g. coverletter/Jaza-Energy-coverletter.pdf).

assertions.name: exactly_one_page
assertions.text: The PDF is exactly one page.

assertions.name: header_has_candidate_name
assertions.text: The header shows the candidate name 'Jordan Goose', centered at the top.

assertions.name: header_has_linkedin_and_email
assertions.text: The header contains the LinkedIn link and the email jordan.goose@uwaterloo.ca from the config.

assertions.name: names_correct_company
assertions.text: The letter body names the correct company (Jaza Energy).

assertions.name: names_role_and_term
assertions.text: The letter references the correct role (AI Engineering Co-op) and work term (Fall 2026).

assertions.name: uses_real_resume_evidence
assertions.text: The body cites concrete experience that actually appears in ai.pdf (e.g. Dtwo.ai / MCP / LLM work) and fabricates no employers, dates, or metrics.

assertions.name: times_font_style
assertions.text: The PDF uses Times (Times-Roman/Times-Bold), matching the reference sample style.

assertions.name: body_word_count_reasonable
assertions.text: Body is roughly 230-360 words (tailored, not padded, fits one page).

evals.name: infer-resume
evals.prompt: Write a cover letter for job 475290, the Klue GenAI software engineering co-op.
evals.expected_output: coverletter/Klue-coverletter.pdf: one page, correct style/header, tailored to the Klue Software Engineering Co-op (GenAI). With no resume named, the skill should consult ranks/shortlist.md and pick ai.pdf.

assertions.name: pdf_named_for_company
assertions.text: An output PDF exists in coverletter/ whose filename is derived from the company (e.g. coverletter/Klue-coverletter.pdf).

assertions.name: exactly_one_page
assertions.text: The PDF is exactly one page.

assertions.name: inferred_correct_resume
assertions.text: With no resume specified, the run selected ai.pdf (the resume ranks/shortlist.md recommends for 475290).

assertions.name: header_has_candidate_name
assertions.text: The header shows 'Jordan Goose' centered at the top.

assertions.name: header_has_linkedin_and_email
assertions.text: The header contains the LinkedIn link and the email from the config.

assertions.name: names_correct_company
assertions.text: The letter body names the correct company (Klue).

assertions.name: names_role_and_term
assertions.text: The letter references the GenAI software engineering role and the Fall 2026 term.

assertions.name: uses_real_resume_evidence
assertions.text: The body cites concrete experience from ai.pdf and fabricates nothing.

assertions.name: times_font_style
assertions.text: The PDF uses Times, matching the reference sample style.

evals.name: backend
evals.prompt: Draft a cover letter for job 475547, the Recurrent Energy junior software developer co-op, using backend.pdf.
evals.expected_output: coverletter/Recurrent-Energy-coverletter.pdf: one page, correct style/header, tailored to the Recurrent Energy Junior Software Developer Co-op using backend.pdf evidence.

assertions.name: pdf_named_for_company
assertions.text: An output PDF exists in coverletter/ whose filename is derived from the company (e.g. coverletter/Recurrent-Energy-coverletter.pdf).

assertions.name: exactly_one_page

assertions.name: header_has_candidate_name
assertions.text: The header shows 'Jordan Goose' centered at the top.

assertions.name: header_has_linkedin_and_email

assertions.name: names_role_and_term
assertions.text: The letter references the junior software developer role and the Fall 2026 term.

assertions.name: uses_real_resume_evidence
assertions.text: The body cites concrete experience that appears in backend.pdf and fabricates nothing.

assertions.name: times_font_style
assertions.text: The PDF uses Times, matching the reference sample style.

assertions.name: body_word_count_reasonable
assertions.text: Body is roughly 230-360 words.
